description: All validated routes using the España Blvd / Quezon Avenue corridor, including Sampaloc, University Belt, Welcome Rotonda, and Quiapo segments

routes.route_name: Route 6/6A: Sapang Palay–PITX via Quezon Avenue
routes.origin: Sapang Palay, City of San Jose del Monte, Bulacan
routes.frequency_notes: Peak ~10-15 min headway; shared España segment with Route 7
routes.notes: Operator: Fairview Bus (FBMC). Via España Blvd-Lerma-Quezon Blvd segment confirmed by OSM Wiki bus routes page. Two variants: 6 (Sapang Palay) and 6A (Norzagaray). Both use identical España segment.

routes.frequency_notes: Peak ~10-15 min headway; shares España segment with Route 6
routes.notes: Operator: Roval Transport (NAT Transpo). Launched 2020. Uses identical España Blvd-Lerma-Quezon Blvd segment as Route 6.
Operator: W. Lippad (Lippad Trans). Confirmed via OSM Wiki bus routes: España Blvd–Lerma–Quezon Blvd segment documented.
Operator: Marikina Auto Line. Confirmed via OSM Wiki bus routes. Uses España-Quezon Ave on northbound direction.
OSM and ltoportal both confirm España segment. Exact España stop alignment varies by source.

routes.origin: Welcome Rotonda (España Blvd / E. Rodriguez Sr. Ave junction), Quezon City/Manila boundary
routes.destination: Aurora Blvd / Katipunan Ave (LRT-2 Katipunan Station)
routes.frequency_notes: Zero-fare; QCityBus electric fleet; 6 min peak headway (QC Gov't claim)
routes.notes: Zero-fare QCityBus route. Origin at España/Welcome Rotonda makes it a direct feeder from España corridor to LRT-2 Katipunan. Confirmed by multiple sources including ltoportal-ph and city-bus-operators files.

routes.route_name: QCityBus Route 6: QC Hall–Gilmore via Quezon Avenue
routes.origin: QC Hall NHA Interchange, Diliman, Quezon City
routes.notes: Uses Quezon Avenue segment. Connects QC Hall area to LRT-2 Gilmore. Confirmed in ltoportal-ph data.

routes.route_name: Love Bus L2: VGC–Fairview via España
key_stops: España Blvd / M. dela Fuente St
routes.frequency_notes: Zero-fare electric minibus; QC Government operated. New electric buses procured Oct 2024.
routes.notes: Only route with confirmed UST gate stop coordinates on corridor. Passes España/M. dela Fuente, España/Lacson (FEU area), and UST main gate. Zero-fare. Confirmed by OSM Wiki bus routes page and QC Gov't announcement. Flag for field verification of current operational status.
LTFRB traditional jeepney route T3167. Modern version: MODERN-011. Connects Quezon Ave corridor to Caloocan LRT-1 station. Confirmed in ltfrb-jeepney-routes and ltfrb-modernization data.

routes.route_name: Recto–Roxas District via Quezon Ave, España Ave
routes.notes: LTFRB route T3169. Explicitly uses both Quezon Ave and España Ave. Single source (ltfrb-jeepney). Exact alignment on España uncertain — may use España Blvd to Roxas District/Quezon Ave north end.
Confirmed in both ltfrb-jeepney-routes and other-major-terminals files. Cross-corridor linking Munoz (near SM North/EDSA) through España to Malate.

routes.destination: España Blvd / M. dela Fuente St, Manila
routes.frequency_notes: Traditional jeepney; short local route within Sampaloc
routes.notes: OSM Wiki jeepney routes page. Local Sampaloc route connecting to España Blvd. Complements university student movement within the belt.

routes.route_name: Litex–TM Kalaw via Commonwealth, Quezon Ave, España
routes.notes: OSM Wiki. Operator: A. Roces Transport Service Cooperative. Full-length trans-corridor route from north QC to Ermita. Passes through España Blvd segment.

routes.frequency_notes: Traditional jeepney; heavy student traffic at España/UST stop
routes.notes: Confirmed in other-major-terminals. Traverses full España-Quezon Ave corridor from Quiapo north through Welcome Rotonda to QC. Key student route.

routes.frequency_notes: Traditional jeepney; one of the busiest cross-corridor routes
routes.notes: Confirmed in other-major-terminals. Connects Quiapo to Cubao via full España-Quezon Ave corridor. Reaches two rail stations (MRT Cubao + LRT-2 Cubao).
Confirmed in other-major-terminals. Longer version of Quiapo–Proj23 route, extending to Fairview. Overlaps heavily with bus Routes 6/7.

routes.frequency_notes: Traditional jeepney; short Sampaloc interior route
routes.notes: Confirmed in other-major-terminals. Serves UST Medical Campus / PGH area via Dapitan. Key route for hospital workers and medical students.

routes.origin: España Blvd (at Blumentritt Rd corner), Sampaloc/Manila
routes.notes: Confirmed in other-major-terminals. Local route serving northern Sampaloc and Blumentritt junction.
Confirmed in other-major-terminals and ltfrb-jeepney files. Provides feeder connection from Roosevelt (near LRT-1 Roosevelt/FPJ station) to Quiapo.
OSM Wiki jeepney list. Single source. Arroceros is near Manila City Hall/Quiapo. Direct España-Quezon Ave corridor use likely.
OSM Wiki jeepney list. Single source. Similar to T348 but different northern terminus (Project 8).
OSM Wiki. Starts at España Blvd; uses Timog Ave (not Quezon Ave main road) to reach Project 2&3. Parallel to main corridor.
OSM Wiki. Cubao to Recto via España corridor. Overlaps with QUIAPO-PROJ4-CUBAO route in reverse direction.

routes.frequency_notes: Traditional jeepney; uses Legarda St parallel to España
routes.notes: Confirmed in other-major-terminals. Uses Legarda St (parallel and south of España Blvd), serving University Belt from south side. Legarda is adjacent to FEU/UE campus area.

routes.frequency_notes: UV Express; terminal-to-terminal with limited stops; operates within 1 km of terminals only
routes.notes: Confirmed in ltfrb-uv-express. G. Tuazon terminal is in Sampaloc (~200m from España/G. Tuazon intersection). Primary Sampaloc-to-Makati UV Express. UVE-MAK-01 is the return trip.
Reverse direction of UVE-N08. Confirmed in ltfrb-uv-express.

routes.destination: Suki Market, Mayon St., Sampaloc, Manila
routes.notes: Confirmed in ltfrb-uv-express. Mayon St. is in the Sampaloc/University Belt interior.

routes.destination: Central Integrated Terminal (CIT), Quezon Avenue, Quezon City
routes.notes: CIT (Central Integrated Terminal) is located on Quezon Avenue near EDSA/MRT-3 Quezon Ave station. Major UV Express terminus for Bulacan routes.
Confirmed in ltfrb-uv-express. Northern Bulacan to Quezon Ave corridor.

routes.destination: MRT-3 Quezon Avenue Station, Quezon City
routes.notes: ₱44 fare confirmed by thepoortraveler.net search. Terminal at MRT-3 Quezon Ave station.

corridor_segments.quezon_avenue_proper: Routes 6, 7, 17, 34, QC6, T3167, T2120 — all use this segment
corridor_segments.welcome_rotonda: Major transfer hub; QCityBus QC3 origin
corridor_segments.espana_blvd: Routes 6, 7, 17, 34, Love Bus L2, multiple jeepneys — shared bus loading zone at España/Morayta footbridge
corridor_segments.sampaloc_interior: T311, Quiapo-Dapitan, UVE-N08 (G.Tuazon), UVE-MAK-04 — local Sampaloc network
corridor_segments.quezon_blvd_quiapo: Southern terminus: Quiapo-Proj23, Quiapo-Proj4, Quiapo-Fairview, Route 3, Route 17 all converge here
